title: The Sunny Becomes the Escape Route
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Sanji, Chiffon, Unknown person #9, Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as The crew races back to the Sunny while Big Mom’s army and the hunger rampage close in.
scene: The Straw Hats fight to reach the Sunny while Big Mom’s rage turns the sea and islands against them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why the hell are you with them!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! We'll meet back up at sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Wait! Their path is a bit off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rabian! Go back down one more time! Where we just were!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll go straight out back to sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We tried to go straight, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now they should be able to make it out of the forest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The memories of the person who once possessed the soul inside those trees

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Will come rushing back to them! But only for a short while!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: While they're confused, Mama can't control them!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: gyaaah! Why are you up here, Sanji?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: G- Get off and swim, Idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that eye looks pretty even when you're angry!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: S- stop making fun of me, dummy!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The escape becomes a race to the Sunny, ending with Pedro’s sacrifice against Perospero.
